Package product

Class StoreProduct

java.lang.Object
product.Product
product.StoreProduct
Direct Known Subclasses:
Comic, Figurine, Game
public abstract class StoreProduct extends Product
Class name: StoreProduct

Description: It implements the store's products

See Also:
  • Product
  • Order

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addCategory(Category... newCategories)
    It allows the system or an employee to add categories to a product

    It allows a registered client to review a product
    void
    changeDiscount(Discount newDiscount)
    It allows an employee to add discounts to products or categories (Discounts is in charge of making sure they don't overlap)

  • Method Details

    • changeStock

      public void changeStock(int newStock) throws IllegalArgumentException
      It allows for an employee to change the product's stock as well as blocking or unblocking stock
      Parameters:
      newStock - the product's new stock
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - stock was negative

    • decreaseStock

      public void decreaseStock(int value) throws IllegalArgumentException
      It decreases the stock a certain value
      Parameters:
      value - the stock's value that should be decreased
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - value was negative

    • increaseStock

      public void increaseStock(int value) throws IllegalArgumentException
      It increases the stock a certain value
      Parameters:
      value - the stock's value that should be increased
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - value was negative

    • addCategory

      public void addCategory(Category... newCategories)
      It allows the system or an employee to add categories to a product
      Parameters:
      newCategories - the categories to be added

    • removeCategory

      public void removeCategory(Category... categories)
      It allows an employee to remove categories from a product
      Parameters:
      categories - the categories to be deleted

    • changeDiscount

      public void changeDiscount(Discount newDiscount) throws NullPointerException
      It allows an employee to add discounts to products or categories (Discounts is in charge of making sure they don't overlap)
      Parameters:
      newDiscount - the new discount to be applied
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - discount was null

    • getCategories

      public Category[] getCategories()
      It returns the product's categories
      Returns:
      the product's categories

    • getPrintCategories

      public String getPrintCategories()
      It returns the product's categories in a save-file-friendly manner
      Returns:
      a string containing the game's categories

    • getStock

      public int getStock()
      It returns's the product's stock
      Returns:
      the product's store

    • addReview

      public void addReview(int scoring, String comment, RegisteredClient author)
      It allows a registered client to review a product
      Parameters:
      scoring - the review's score
      comment - the review's comment
      author - the review's author
